description_long: This beer garden features a circular gravel seating area surrounded by a grassy lawn and enclosed on two sides by a black picket fence. The central area contains a fire pit with wooden logs arranged in a star pattern, surrounded by six cushioned wooden armchairs and two small round side tables. The seating is arranged symmetrically, providing a communal and inviting atmosphere. Scattered rocks are visible on the grass, adding a naturalistic touch to the setting. The overall layout is open, with ample space between the chairs and tables, and no overhead coverings or decorative lighting. The materials and design evoke a casual, rustic outdoor gathering space.
description: A circular outdoor beer garden with cushioned wooden chairs, a central fire pit, side tables, and partial black picket fencing on a grassy lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular seating area, fire pit, all six chairs, two side tables, and the black picket fence in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of chairs and tables, with the fire pit at the center and the fence to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with the black picket fence in the foreground, showing the seating area and fire pit beyond the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the fence on the left, displaying the circular layout, scattered rocks, and open grassy area.
attribute_outdoor_seating_arrangement: Six cushioned wooden armchairs are arranged in a circle around a central fire pit, with two small round side tables interspersed. The seating is evenly spaced, with no umbrellas or canopies present.
